VAL-FOUND-001.description: Supported git startup resolves canonical repo identity consistently
VAL-FOUND-001.evidence: RepoContext.test.ts: 'resolves canonical repo from repo root', 'resolves same canonical repo from nested subdirectory', 'resolves same canonical repo from linked sibling worktree', 'resolves same default branch from repo root and linked worktree'

VAL-FOUND-002.description: Non-repository startup is blocked with a clear unsupported state
VAL-FOUND-002.evidence: RepoContext.test.ts: 'returns unsupported when not in a git repository'

VAL-FOUND-003.description: Startup ignores legacy sessions that do not belong to a worktree
VAL-FOUND-003.evidence: SessionManager.worktree.test.ts: 'ignores legacy sessions without worktreeId during rehydration'

VAL-FOUND-004.description: Valid worktree-linked state rehydrates into a consistent worktree-session graph
VAL-FOUND-004.evidence: SessionManager.worktree.test.ts: 'rehydrates session with worktreeId from persistence when worktree exists', 'rehydrates multiple sessions linked to the same worktree', 'can reconstruct worktree-session relationships after rehydration'

VAL-FOUND-005.description: Default branch resolution is explicit and resilient
VAL-FOUND-005.evidence: RepoContext.test.ts: 'resolves default branch from origin/HEAD when available', 'falls back to main branch when origin/HEAD unavailable', 'falls back to master branch when main unavailable', 'returns unsupported when no default branch can be determined'

VAL-FOUND-006.description: Orphaned worktree-linked sessions are excluded from the restored graph
VAL-FOUND-006.evidence: SessionManager.worktree.test.ts: 'filters orphaned sessions with unknown worktreeId', 'filters sessions with unknown worktreeIds from graph'

notes: All worktree-foundation assertions are validated through comprehensive automated unit tests
RepoContext service implements canonical repo detection and default branch resolution
SessionManager worktree linkage tests verify rehydration, legacy session filtering, and orphaned session handling
TypeScript type checking passes with no errors
tuistory is not available in this environment per user-testing.md - validated via automated tests instead
